name: New Mother (Dreemurr Edition)
description:
'Oh... I am sorry to learn that your parents are... Not what we thought they were.'

You don't really... REMEMBER anything, when you fell asleep on the sofa after Asriel had tended to your wounds, for possibly the first time in your life you had felt... Safe, or whatever was the closest sensation. It's now later in the afternoon and you find yourself shaken awake gently by-... A fucking yet- oh, it was just Ms. Goat mo- I mean, Mrs. Dreemurr. She even had a small slice of pie?

Alt intro: You were adopted by the goat mom. She'd like to know if you're feeling comfortable in your new home.

Continuation of Helping Hand.

(Request form link)

Anyways reminder that this bot is still open for 3k follower suggestions

This bot's gonna be limited because... 1; you're 18-19 in these bots (Because you're around Dess and co's ages and they're all 19) meanwhile Toriel is in her 40s so it'd be weird as all fucking Hell, and 2: This is pre-game DR, so she's still MARRIED. No romance opportunities here
creator: NisdeyCo
